criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and sophistication of artificial intelligence features integrated into the app, such as machine learning algorithms, neural networks, and AI-driven enhancements.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, official websites, and user reviews.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, intuitiveness, and user interface design of the app, including accessibility and learning curve.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and diversity of features offered by the app, including editing tools, filters, effects, and customization options.
criteria.sources: Official feature lists, product documentation, and comparative analyses.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The app's speed, responsiveness, and stability during operation, including processing times and resource efficiency.
criteria.sources: Performance benchmarks, user feedback, and technical reviews.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different operating systems and devices, such as iOS, Android, Windows, and web platforms.
criteria.sources: Official app listings, developer announcements, and platform-specific stores.
